genre_refs: Art Nouveau / Alphonse Mucha style; Lady Liberty / Columbia allegory; WPA-era recruitment poster
description: An AI-generated recruitment poster from the Department of Labor in an Art Nouveau and Art Deco style. It depicts a female figure: a young woman with long flowing brown hair wearing a white Grecian gown belted with a star medallion, holding up a flaming golden torch in her raised right hand, with a golden sunburst behind her head. The background is a symmetrical composition of golden rays, geometric beams, and a sunburst against black, with portions of a star-spangled banner at the bottom. The rendering is smooth and painterly. Large bold white sans-serif text across the lower third reads 'YOUR HOMELAND IS CALLING!' and beneath it in smaller spaced caps 'APPRENTICESHIP.GOV'.
